crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, and work on your highest priority task.

crons.name: experiment-outreach-conversion
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/autoresearch/SKILL.md and execute the experiment loop for the outreach-conversion cycle.

crons.name: reply-rate-experiment-loop
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/autoresearch/SKILL.md and execute the experiment loop for cycle reply_rate_by_hook_structure. Measure rolling 14d reply_received / email_sent per hook_variant × structure_variant. Log keep/discard decisions.

crons.name: internal-email-poll
crons.prompt: Check #internal-email (C0AUBAL58RK) for feedback on the current batch of 5 leads. If feedback posted: implement changes, delete old 5 Gmail drafts, create revised 5 drafts for same leads, repost to #internal-email. If ship signal (user says good/send/ship for the batch): send those 5 emails, then pick 5 fresh leads, create new drafts, post to #internal-email. If auto-send activation (user posts turn it on in channel): activate auto-send for all future batches. If no new messages: note check and wait. SSM excluded from lead pool.
